assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 37 shows the third JQL query as: project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC. This matches the required labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) conditions.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md documents the analysis for all 3 query 3 candidates. TC-9020 (lines 34-39): checks issuelinks for Depend type, finds TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed). TC-9023 (lines 55-60): checks issuelinks for Depend type, finds TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress). TC-9026 (line 76): checks issuelinks for Depend type, finds none. The filtering criteria on lines 18-19 explicitly state: 'Check issuelinks for links where type.name is Depend' and 'For each linked Task, check its current status'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 36-43: TC-9021 status Done (Completed: Yes), TC-9022 status Closed (Completed: Yes). Assessment: 'ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (Done or Closed).' Result: 'INCLUDED in Ready for QA'. Also confirmed in discovery-listing.md line 43 where TC-9020 appears in the Ready for QA table with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' in the Remediation Tasks column.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 63-64: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress. Not all remediation Tasks are complete.' Result on line 64: 'EXCLUDED — remediation is still in progress'. Also discovery-listing.md line 49: 'TC-9023 ... Excluded: TC-9025 is still In Progress. Remediation is not yet complete.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 76: 'Linked remediation Tasks (Depend): None'. Line 78: 'No issuelinks with type "Depend" exist on this issue.' Line 80: 'EXCLUDED — no remediation to verify'. Also discovery-listing.md line 50: 'TC-9026 ... Excluded: No linked Tasks with type "Depend". No remediation to verify.'

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 41-43: The Ready for QA table includes a 'Remediation Tasks' column header, and for TC-9020 shows 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' in that column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: TC-9020 is the only issue in the Ready for QA section. discovery-listing.md line 45: 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All linked remediation tasks have been completed.' ready-for-qa.md line 45: 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' and line 98: 'TC-9020: Transition to ON_QA. All remediation is complete.'
